segments_note: FY2025 total revenue was a record $529.8M (+6.7%) — a 5th consecutive record year. Net retail sales were $486.0M (+5.6%). The capital-light commercial + international-franchising segments combined for ~$43.9M, up ~21.6% YoY (from $36.1M in FY2024); Q4 alone +37.5%.

locations.guidance: 60+ net new global experience locations delivered for a 2nd straight year (guidance: at least 50)

ecommerce_note: E-commerce demand (online orders) is choppy quarter to quarter: Q1 FY25 +0.5%, Q2 +15.1%, Q3 -10.8%.
